question_text: Compare electromagnets and permanent magnets. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Permanent magnets can be switched on and off, but electromagnets cannot

options.label: B
options.text: Electromagnets can be switched on and off, and their strength can be controlled

options.label: C
options.text: Electromagnets are always stronger than permanent magnets

options.label: D
options.text: Permanent magnets need electricity to work, but electromagnets do not

explanation: The key advantage of electromagnets is that you can control them—turn them on/off with a switch and adjust strength by changing current. Permanent magnets cannot be controlled like this, making electromagnets better for many applications.
